name: Rashod Bateman
headline: Bateman's 2025 Cratered, And The Numbers Are Brutal
body:
The advanced profile fell off a cliff in 2025. Bateman managed just 224 yards and two scores across 13 games, his target share collapsing to 9.3% on 38 looks while his catch rate dropped to a dismal 50%. His efficiency cratered alongside the volume: a minus-0.072 EPA per play, a 44.7% success rate, and a meager 0.76 yards per route run that ranked him WR110. That is a near-total erosion of the WR38 form he flashed in 2024.

The 2024 baseline is the reason to keep watching: 756 yards, nine touchdowns, a 1.83 YPRR, and a 0.625 EPA per play on a 15.8% target share. But that ceiling now sits behind Zay Flowers, with rookies pushing for snaps and the role looking like a downfield complement rather than a featured target. He is a deep-league dart throw until the volume returns.
